content: Cohen's kappa: κ = (po − pe) / (1 − pe) where po = observed agreement, pe = expected chance agreement. For 2 raters classifying N items into C categories. Landis & Koch (1977) thresholds: <0 none, 0-0.20 slight, 0.21-0.40 fair, 0.41-0.60 moderate, 0.61-0.80 substantial, 0.81-1.0 almost perfect. Project requires κ ≥ 0.6 (substantial). Fleiss' kappa extends to 3+ raters. Formula implementable as pure JS function.
